title: Custom Shopkeepers
description: Adds new shopkeeper types to the Pixelmon Mod
body:
This addon datapack for the [Pixelmon Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/pixelmon) introduces five new shopkeeper types: TCG cardpacks, EV training items, Nature mints, TRs and Alolan TMs.

These NPCs can be found as a potential secondary shopkeeper in village pokemarts (this will only impact newly generated pokemarts if this datapack is installed to an existing world), or spawned manually using the NPC editor item.

This datapack was designed for minecraft 1.16.5 and pixelmon 9.1.5.
